response.justification: While Bogdan is a skilled software engineer with 19 years of cross-domain experience and strong technical credentials, he does not align with this role's core requirements. The position specifically demands recognized AI expertise with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI; his resume shows recent entry into AI-agent infrastructure work but lacks the deep, proven AI/ML specialization, advanced degree in AI, and cloud/AI platform strategy experience essential for a director-level AI strategy role. His background is primarily in full-stack and web development rather than AI leadership.
strengths: Significantly exceeds 15-year minimum requirement with 19 years of varied software engineering experience
Founder of open-source GISCollective platform demonstrates entrepreneurial drive and technical innovation capability
Recent transition into AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq suggests career trajectory toward AI-focused work
concerns: No Master's degree or PhD in AI-related field; resume contains no advanced education in AI/ML (key preferred qualification)
Lacks demonstrated AI expertise or recognized AI products/platforms—central to the role despite recent involvement
No evidence of cloud platform strategy experience, director-level team leadership, or customer advisory responsibilities

key_factors.factor: Absence of demonstrated AI expertise and products
No advanced degree in AI/related field
